docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, MARK A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY $3,416.16 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,416.16, PLAINTIFF HAS MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # A5625905D005, TAG # 038134 BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPY FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING REVENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, MARK A
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KIT WONG FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,018.46 FILED BY SIMMONS, MARK A AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, MARK A ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-09-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARK SIMMONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY (KIT WONG) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
